## Functions

|  Function | Description |
|  --- | --- |
|  [create(config)](./sdk.create.md) | <p>Create an instance of the zeitgeist sdk with full features of both indexer and chain rpc.</p><p> full  create with different config to enable indexer or rpc features.</p> |
|  [create(config)](./sdk.create_1.md) | <p>Create an instance of the zeitgeist sdk with only rpc features.</p><p> rpc  create with different config to enable indexer or rpc features.</p> |
|  [create(config)](./sdk.create_2.md) | <p>Create an instance of the zeitgeist sdk with only indexer features.</p><p> indexer  create with different config to enable indexer or rpc features.</p> |

Useful when initializing in a UI context where displaying data from the indexer as fast as possible is a priority.</p><p>Creates a shared observable that replays last emitted sdk instace to late subscribers, and disconnectes the rpc provider when all subscribers unsubscribe.</p><p> If config is indexer and rpc, indexer sdk will emit first.</p> |
